channel.title: Protein Design Podcast
channel.description: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research
channel.itunes:author: Eva Dai
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-08
item.description: In 2025, researchers announced they had solved a 700-year-old mystery: the identity of a murdered medieval nobleman whose skeleton was discovered in 1926 near the Hungarian-Romanian border. | The biological profile was striking. | The trauma analysis revealed 23 cut marks distributed across the skeleton in a pattern suggesting multiple attackers striking from different directions.
item.itunes:author: Eva Dai
item.itunes:summary: In 2025, researchers announced they had solved a 700-year-old mystery: the identity of a murdered medieval nobleman whose skeleton was discovered in 1926 near the Hungarian-Romanian border. | The biological profile was striking. | The trauma analysis revealed 23 cut marks distributed across the skeleton in a pattern suggesting multiple attackers striking from different directions.
